dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The air in this place... it's strange. Not thick with dust and the metallic tang of blood, but clean. Almost sweet.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Ten years. Ten years since I last saw this sky. Korea. My home. The place I don't remember.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE (airplane engines)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK (seatbelt unbuckling)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: After a decade spent in the unforgiving crucible of war, the boy known only as 'Number 001' had returned. Not to a battlefield, but to a family he barely knew.

dialogue.speaker: Grandpa
dialogue.line: Ijin! My boy! Look at you, all grown up! You're so tall!

dialogue.speaker: Grandma
dialogue.line: Oh, my poor grandson! You must be exhausted. Come, come, let's get you home.

dialogue.speaker: Dayun
dialogue.line: (shyly, peeking from behind Grandma) Oppa...?

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Dayun. My sister. She's even smaller than in the photo. Her eyes... they're so bright. No fear. No shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Hello.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The reunion was awkward, filled with unspoken words and a chasm of lost time. But there was warmth. A fragile, unfamiliar warmth.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The next day, a new mission began: 'High School Student'.

dialogue.speaker: Teacher
dialogue.line: Alright class, settle down! We have a new student joining us today. Please welcome Yu Ijin.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHISPERS (students)

dialogue.speaker: Student 1
dialogue.line: Whoa, he's kinda intense.

dialogue.speaker: Student 2
dialogue.line: Is he a transfer from some tough school? He looks like he's seen things.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Threat assessment: Low. Environmental hazards: Social interaction. Objective: Integrate. Maintain cover.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Yu Ijin. Please take care of me.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The day passed in a blur of unfamiliar routines and strange customs. Then came lunch. Another new battlefield, apparently.

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: Hey, new kid. You dropped something.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRASH (plastic tray hitting floor)

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Threat detected. Aggressor identified. Provocation level: Minor. Response protocol: Non-lethal, deterrent.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: What, you gonna cry? Pick up your trash, peasant.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: No.

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: What did you say?! You got a death wish, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK (Ijin's grip on his remaining tray, plastic groans)

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Control. Remember the mission. No unnecessary casualties. No drawing attention. Just... normal.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (calmly) Apologize.

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: You think you're tough, huh?! I'll teach you some manners!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (Bully Leader's fist swings)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK (a precise, almost silent interception)

dialogue.speaker: Bully Leader
dialogue.line: AGH! My wrist! What the—?!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (whispering, eyes cold) Don't touch my things again. Or anyone else's. Understand?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD (Bully Leader crumples, clutching his wrist)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A subtle twist, a precise application of pressure. Enough to send a clear message without leaving a mark. The boy from the battlefield was learning to adapt his skills to a new kind of war.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Was that... 'normal'? I think so. No one died. Good.

dialogue.speaker: Dayun
dialogue.line: Oppa, you're home early!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Dayun
dialogue.line: Did you make any friends today?

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Friends. That's a new concept. A luxury I never had. But for her... maybe.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: Not yet.

dialogue.speaker: Dayun
dialogue.line: It's okay! I can help you! We can be friends!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (thought) Her smile. So innocent. So vulnerable. This is my new mission. Protect her. Protect this family. No matter what.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world was still new, still strange, and filled with unfamiliar dangers. But with Dayun's hand in his, a small part of Ijin felt like he was finally, truly, home.

summary: Ijin Yu, a former child mercenary, returns to Korea after ten years and reunites with his family. On his first day of high school, he encounters bullies and subtly uses his combat skills to deter them, all while trying to adapt to a normal life and protect his younger sister, Dayun.
